chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 930 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For non-prosecution 12.08.2025 Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh Mr. Khalil Ahmed Metlo, Deputy PG for State >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioner. Learned Law Officers present and submit that since this is a case of Narcotic and by virtue of Amendment under the Act, the FIR of which was registered on 02.06.2025 and it might had been challaned, therefore, in view of the dicta laid down by learned Apex Court in the case of Assistant Director, Anti-Corruption Establishment, Lahore and others vs. Muhammad Akram Khan and others (PLD 2013 Supreme Court 401), the purpose of filing instant Petition is over, hence the petition has got alternate remedy, if so advised. In view of the above as well as submissions made by learned Law Officers, the instant Petition is hereby dismissed with no order as to costs. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
